name: Malfurion
description: A strong sustained Healer who can help lockdown enemies to secure takedowns.
title: Archdruid
info: Malfurion Stormrage is the greatest druid on Azeroth, and a student of the demi-god Cenarius. Communing with nature and Cenarius through the Emerald dream, Malfurion protects the wilds from demonic influences.

Malfurion.name: Regrowth
Malfurion.description: Heal an allied Hero for 380 (+4% per level) Health over 20 seconds.

Malfurion.name: Moonfire
Malfurion.description: Deal 90 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in an area and reveal them for 2 seconds.  Allies with an active Regrowth are healed for 130 (+4% per level) Health for each enemy Hero hit by Moonfire.

Malfurion.name: Entangling Roots
Malfurion.description: Root enemy Heroes in an area for 1.25 seconds, and deal 117 (+4% per level) damage over the duration. Affected area grows over 3 seconds.

Malfurion.name: Tranquility
Malfurion.description: Heal nearby allied Heroes for 80 (+4% per level) Health per second for 8 seconds. Allies affected by Regrowth within Tranquility's area gain 10 Armor.

Malfurion.name: Twilight Dream
Malfurion.description: After 0.5 seconds, deal 310 (+4% per level) damage in a large area around Malfurion, Silencing enemies making them unable to use Abilities for 3 seconds.

Malfurion.name: Innervate
Malfurion.description: Grant an allied Hero 20% of their maximum Mana over 5 seconds. While affected by Innervate, their Basic Ability cooldowns recharge 50% faster.  Cannot be used on Heroes that do not use Mana.

1.name: Deep Roots
1.description: Entangling Roots grows 25% larger, and persist on the ground 40% longer.  Repeatable Quest: Every time an enemy Hero becomes Rooted, gain 14 Mana permanently.

1.name: Vengeful Roots
1.description: Entangling Roots spawns a Treant that deals 58 damage per second and loses Health over 11 seconds.  Repeatable Quest: Hitting enemy Heroes with Entangling Roots permanently increases the Treant's Basic Attack damage by 7.

1.name: Emerald Dreams
1.description: Entangling Roots Sleeps enemy Heroes for 2 seconds after its Root expires.

4.name: Rejuvenation
4.description: Casting Regrowth on an ally also grants Malfurion its effect for 50% normal duration.

4.name: Celestial Alignment
4.description: Increase Moonfire's reveal duration by 3 seconds. Malfurion's Basic Attacks against Heroes revealed by Moonfire deal 85% more damage.

4.name: Shan'do's Clarity
4.description: Gain a second charge of Innervate. Its cooldown recharges 25% faster per ally affected by Regrowth.

7.name: Wild Growth
7.description: Each Hero hit by Moonfire extends the duration of currently active Regrowths by 1 second.

7.name: Tenacious Roots
7.description: Increase the Root duration of Entangling Roots by 25%. When Malfurion is Stunned, the cooldown of Entangling Roots is instantly reset. This can only occur every 10 seconds.

7.name: Nature's Cure
7.description: Activate to remove all Stuns, Roots, and Slows from allies affected by Regrowth.

10.name: Tranquility
10.description: Heal nearby allied Heroes for 80 (+4% per level) Health per second for 8 seconds. Allies affected by Regrowth within Tranquility's area gain 10 Armor.

10.name: Twilight Dream
10.description: After 0.5 seconds, deal 310 (+4% per level) damage in a large area around Malfurion, Silencing enemies making them unable to use Abilities for 3 seconds.

13.name: Nature's Swiftness
13.description: Malfurion gains 6% Movement Speed for every active Regrowth.

13.name: Hindering Moonfire
13.description: Moonfire Slows Heroes hit by 25% for 3 seconds.

13.name: Revitalize
13.description: Using Innervate also grants Malfurion 15% of his max Mana and causes his Basic Ability cooldowns to refresh 50% faster for 5 seconds.

16.name: Ysera's Gift
16.description: While Malfurion is above 75% Health, Regrowth's healing-over-time is increased by 75%.

16.name: Nature's Balance
16.description: Increase Moonfire's area by 25% and Regrowth's duration by 5 seconds.

16.name: Moonlit Harmony
16.description: Increase Moonfire's heal by 20%, and 15% per ally affected by Regrowth.

20.name: Serenity
20.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Moonfire reduces the cooldown of Tranquility by 3 seconds. Increase Tranquility's healing by 25% and 10% per ally affected by Regrowth.

20.name: Astral Communion
20.description: Activate to Channel for 1 second, and then instantly teleport and cast Twilight Dream at the targeted location. Cooldown is shared with Twilight Dream.  Passive: Increase Twilight Dream's Silence duration to 5 seconds.

20.name: Lifebloom
20.description: Casting Regrowth instantly heals its target for 10% of their missing Health.

20.name: Lunar Shower
20.description: If Moonfire hits a Hero, its cooldown is reduced by 1 second and the next Moonfire within 6 seconds deals 20% more damage. This damage bonus stacks up to 60%.

tooltipMarkup.MalfurionEntanglingRoots: Root enemy Heroes in an area for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,EntanglingRootsRoot,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds, and deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,EntanglingRootsDamage,Amount * 3"/></c> damage over the duration. Affected area grows over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,EntanglingRootsCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0] * [d ref='Effect,EntanglingRootsCreatePersistent,PeriodCount' player='0'/]" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionEntanglingRootsDeepRootsTalent: Entangling Roots grows 25% larger, and persist on the ground 40% longer.Repeatable Quest: Every time an enemy Hero becomes Rooted, gain Mana permanently.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionEntanglingRootsEmeraldDreams: Entangling Roots Sleeps enemy Heroes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalfurionEntanglingRootsEmeraldDreamsSleepBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds after its Root expires.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionEntanglingRootsTenaciousRootsTa: Increase the Root duration of Entangling Roots by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(100*Talent,MalfurionMasteryTenaciousRootsEntanglingRoots,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value)-100"/>%</c>. When Malfurion is Stunned, the cooldown of Entangling Roots is instantly reset. This can only occur every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,MalfurionEntanglingRootsTenaciousRoots,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionEntanglingRootsVengefulRootsTal: Entangling Roots spawns a Treant that deals damage per second and loses Health over seconds.Repeatable Quest: Hitting enemy Heroes with Entangling Roots permanently increases the Treant's Basic Attack damage by .
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionInnervate: Grant an allied Hero <c val="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> of their maximum Mana over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,Innervate,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds. While affected by Innervate, their Basic Ability cooldowns recharge <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> faster.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Cannot be used on Heroes that do not use Mana.</c>
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionInnervateShandosClarityTalent: Gain a second charge of Innervate. Its cooldown recharges <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> faster per ally affected by Regrowth.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionMoonfire: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MoonfireDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies in an area and reveal them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalfurionMoonfireReveal,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Allies with an active Regrowth are healed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalfurionRegrowthMoonfireImpactCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Health for each enemy Hero hit by Moonfire.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionMoonfireCelestialAlignmentTalen: Increase Moonfire's reveal duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,MalfurionCelestialAlignment,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value" player="0"/></c> seconds. Malfurion's Basic Attacks against Heroes revealed by Moonfire deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,RangedAttackMalfurionDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[CelestialAlignment].Modifier"/>%</c> more damage.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionMoonfireHinderingMoonfireTalent: Moonfire Slows Heroes hit by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,HinderingMoonfire,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HinderingMoonfire,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionMoonfireLunarShowerTalent: If Moonfire hits a Hero, its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second and the next Moonfire within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalfurionMoonfireLunarShowerBuffDuration,Duration"/></c> seconds deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,MalfurionMoonfireLunarShowerAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c> more damage. This damage bonus stacks up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalfurionMoonfireLunarShowerTokenCounter,Max * (100*Accumulator,MalfurionMoonfireLunarShowerAccumulator,Scale)"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionMoonfireMoonlitHarmonyTalent: Increase Moonfire's heal by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,MalfurionRegrowthMoonfireImpactCreateHealer,MultiplicativeModifierArray[MoonlitHarmony].Modifier"/>%</c>, and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,MalfurionMoonlitHarmonyAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c> per ally affected by Regrowth.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionMoonfireWildGrowthTalent: Each Hero hit by Moonfire extends the duration of currently active Regrowths by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalfurionMoonfireWildGrowthModifyBehaviorDuration,Value"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionNaturesCure: Activate to remove all Stuns, Roots, and Slows from allies affected by Regrowth.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionRegrowth: Heal an allied Hero for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RegrowthHeal,RechargeVitalRate*[d ref='(Behavior,Regrowth,Duration / Behavior,Regrowth,Period)' player='0'/]"/> </c>Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,Regrowth,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionRegrowthMoonfireLifebloomTalent: Casting Regrowth instantly heals its target for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,MalfurionLifebloomAccumulator,Ratio"/>%</c> of their missing Health.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionRegrowthNaturesBalanceTalent: Increase Moonfire's area by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,MalfurionRegrowthNaturesBalance,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value-100" precision="1"/>%</c> and Regrowth's duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,MalfurionRegrowthNaturesBalance,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[4].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionRegrowthNaturesSwiftnessTalent: Malfurion gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,MalfurionNaturesSwiftnessAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c> Movement Speed for every active Regrowth.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionRejuvenationTalent: Casting Regrowth on an ally also grants Malfurion its effect for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,MalfurionRegrowthRejuvenationTalentApplyBehavior,Duration/Behavior,Regrowth,Duration"player="0"/>%</c> normal duration.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionRevitalizeInnervateTalent: Using Innervate also grants Malfurion <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,MalfurionRevitalizeAccumulator,Ratio"/>%</c> of his max Mana and causes his Basic Ability cooldowns to refresh <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> faster for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalfurionInnervateRevitalizeBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionTranquility: Heal nearby allied Heroes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TranquilityHeal,RechargeVitalRate *2"/></c> Health per second for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="[d ref='Effect,TranquilityCreatePersistent,PeriodCount' player='0'/] * Effect,TranquilityCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"/></c> seconds. Allies affected by Regrowth within Tranquility's area gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalfurionTranquilityArmorBehavior,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionTranquilitySerenityTalent: Each enemy Hero hit by Moonfire reduces the cooldown of Tranquility by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,MalfurionTranquilitySerenityModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds. Increase Tranquility's healing by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TranquilityHeal,MultiplicativeModifierArray[MalfurionTranquilitySerenity].Modifier*100"/>%</c> and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,MalfurionSerenityAccumulater,Scale"/>%</c> per ally affected by Regrowth.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionTwilightDream: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,MalfurionTwilightDream,CastIntroTime"  precision="2"/></c> seconds, deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TwilightDreamDamage,Amount[0]"/></c> damage in a large area around Malfurion, Silencing enemies making them unable to use Abilities for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TwilightDreamSilence,Duration" player="0"/> </c>seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionTwilightDreamAstralCommunionTal: Activate to Channel for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalfurionAstralCommunionPrepareDelayPersistent,PeriodCount*Effect,MalfurionAstralCommunionPrepareDelayPersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"/></c> second, and then instantly teleport and cast Twilight Dream at the targeted location. Cooldown is shared with Twilight Dream.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Twilight Dream's Silence duration to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalfurionYserasGift: While Malfurion is above <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Validator,CasterLifeGT75Percent,Value"/>%</c> Health, Regrowth's healing-over-time is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,RegrowthHeal,MultiplicativeModifierArray[YserasGift].Modifier"/>%</c>.
